chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2774 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on statement Gax/XII.Z.14 for RB 2. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 None present for the petitioner --------- This matter was lastly taken up on 05.12.2024. In the last nine months, learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. It is noted that the question of maintainability still remains outstanding. Today, none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
